  "society_power": 9.6,

  "key_event": "Sectional crisis over slavery overwhelms federal authority.",

Meanwhile, hyper-mobilized and violently opposed societal factions (pro- and anti-slavery) grew powerful enough to overwhelm state institutions, pushing society's power to a peak.",
